title: Tapping to Attract the Right Advisors and Deals
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing the fear of navigating big financial decisions alone and opening to aligned support
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 74 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the fear of making major financial decisions without the right guidance, and moves toward a confident expectation of aligned advisors, mentors, and opportunities arriving.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 74 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when big financial decisions feel isolating, or when you have been putting off seeking the expert support your wealth building actually needs.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 74 of a 12-week money programme. The script works with the feeling of facing large financial decisions without the right people around you, and moves toward a settled expectation of aligned advisors, mentors, and opportunities coming in at the right time.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I once felt alone in big financial decisions, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've worried about finding people I can trust, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've feared missing the right guidance, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I don't have to do this alone.
Side of eye: The right mentors and partners are out there.
Under eye: Experts who align with my vision.
Under nose: People who handle details with care.
Chin: I welcome support that feels right.
Collarbone: I trust the timing of each connection.
Under arm: I expect excellent opportunities.
Top of head: I draw in wise advisors and great deals.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: I magnetise trustworthy financial allies.
Side of eye: Brilliant advisors come into my life easily.
Under eye: Deals arrive that fit perfectly.
Under nose: I trust my instincts to choose well.
Chin: I build a strong, smart wealth team.
Collarbone: I enjoy guidance that multiplies abundance.
Under arm: I celebrate every aligned connection.
Top of head: I am fully supported in building my legacy.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 74 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
